Row.Text: A Grand Colosseum is an upgrade to the default Colosseum, adding more [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness and [ICON_GOLD] gold to your city. A Colosseum must be in the city before a Grand Colosseum.
A Grand Colosseum is an upgrade to the default Colosseum, adding more [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness and [ICON_GOLD] gold to your city. A Colosseum must be in the city before a Grand Colosseum.
A Grand Colosseum is an upgrade to the default Colosseum, adding more [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness and [ICON_GOLD] gold to your city. A Colosseum must be in the city before a Grand Colosseum.
